title: Claude + NotebookLM: Ultimate AI Automation Workflow to Work 10x Faster
summary: YouTube tutorial demonstrating three no-code AI automation workflows combining Claude and NotebookLM for content creation. Workflows include a content machine converting topics to multi-format outputs, an infographic engine leveraging Claude prompting, and an automated pipeline using Claude Cowork for scheduled podcast generation. The tutorial references June 2026 updates including Gemini 3.5 Flash and Veo 3 cinematic video.
writeup: The video walks through three no-code workflows that pair Claude with NotebookLM for content creation: a content machine that turns a single topic into multiple output formats, an infographic engine driven by Claude prompting, and an automated pipeline that uses Claude Cowork to schedule podcast generation. It frames these as practical automation patterns built on prompt engineering and code generation rather than custom development. The tutorial references June 2026 updates, including Gemini 3.5 Flash and Veo 3 cinematic video.
